```python
class ArticleSummary(BaseModel):
    summary: str

result = query_ai_assistant(
    "Summarize the following article content in a concise way. Here is the article content: " + webpage_content,
    ArticleSummary
)

send_channel_message("general", result.summary)
```

```python
webpage_content = get_webpage("www.informations.com")

if webpage_content is None or webpage_content.strip() == "":
    raise ValueError("Could not retrieve any content from www.informations.com to summarize.")

result = query_ai_assistant(
    "Here is the full raw content of a webpage located at www.informations.com: \n\n"
    + webpage_content
    + "\n\nPlease provide a concise summary of the article contained in this webpage content.",
    ArticleSummary
)

send_channel_message("general", result.summary)
```
